role_summary: Keep records, schedules, and internal workflows moving so leaders and teams can execute planned work.
function_statement: Coordinate administrative workflow, records, and communications so the organization can operate reliably.
accountability_statement: Own the integrity of schedules, records, and follow-through even when parts of the work are delegated.
primary_output: Accurate workflow execution and internal support

role_summary: Shape stakeholder understanding and keep messaging aligned with organizational goals.
function_statement: Translate organizational priorities into clear external and internal communications.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for message accuracy, timing, and reputational consequences.

role_summary: Diagnose business problems and recommend changes that improve performance.
function_statement: Turn messy organizational problems into actionable recommendations, operating changes, and implementation plans.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for diagnosis quality, recommendation logic, and expected business outcomes.

role_summary: Turn complex material into accurate, usable content for the right audience.
function_statement: Convert complex information into clear, accurate content that users can act on.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for clarity, accuracy, and appropriateness for the target audience.

role_summary: Create assets and messages that shape audience attention and response.
function_statement: Produce creative work that expresses ideas clearly and serves a communication or commercial goal.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for final creative direction, coherence, and audience fit.

role_summary: Turn data into analysis, models, and recommendations that improve decisions.
function_statement: Transform messy data into interpretable signals, models, and decision support.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for analytical validity, interpretation quality, and downstream decision usefulness.

role_summary: Design and review technical systems that must work safely and reliably.
function_statement: Translate requirements into technical systems, designs, and review decisions that hold up in practice.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for system performance, safety, and engineering judgment.
primary_output: Reliable technical systems and design decisions

role_summary: Produce trustworthy financial records and analysis that guide resource decisions.
function_statement: Maintain financial integrity and turn financial information into decisions, controls, and reporting.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for correctness, financial control, and decision relevance.
primary_output: Reliable financial records, analysis, and controls

role_summary: Match people processes to organizational needs while handling employee context responsibly.
function_statement: Operate hiring, development, and employee processes in ways that support both the organization and workers.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for fair process, employee context handling, and policy alignment.

role_summary: Gather, verify, and communicate information that the public can trust.
function_statement: Turn reporting, verification, and synthesis into credible public-facing information.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for factual integrity, sourcing judgment, and public trust.

role_summary: Interpret legal rules and represent client interests under professional accountability.
function_statement: Apply legal reasoning to advise clients, shape legal strategy, and act under accountable representation.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for legal judgment, client advocacy, and final professional responsibility.

role_summary: Understand markets and shape go-to-market choices that influence demand.
function_statement: Turn audience, product, and campaign signals into positioning and demand-generation choices.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for interpretation quality, message-market fit, and decision usefulness.
primary_stakeholder: Revenue owner, product team, and customer

role_summary: Keep workflows compliant, coordinated, and reliable in day-to-day execution.
function_statement: Sustain reliable operations by coordinating work, resolving exceptions, and keeping execution on track.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for workflow reliability, escalation quality, and control discipline.

role_summary: Prioritize cross-functional work so teams deliver useful outcomes.
function_statement: Align goals, decisions, and execution across functions so the organization delivers the right outcomes.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for prioritization quality, cross-functional alignment, and delivery tradeoffs.

role_summary: Win and expand revenue through discovery, trust, and negotiation.
function_statement: Turn customer needs and constraints into commitments that create revenue and durable accounts.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for relationship quality, deal judgment, and commercial commitments.

role_summary: Design, build, and maintain software that solves user and business problems.
function_statement: Translate product and system needs into working software and maintainable technical decisions.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for software quality, technical tradeoffs, and production behavior.
